name: Market Entry Strategy
description: Plan market entry strategies for new products or geographies

agents.name: Market Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the target market for entry planning
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the target market: size, growth, customer needs, competitive landscape, regulatory requirements, distribution channels, cultural considerations, and barriers to entry. Identify early adopter segments.

agents.name: Strategy Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a market entry strategy with: market assessment, entry mode recommendation (direct, partnership, acquisition), target segment prioritization, value proposition for the market, go-to-market playbook (channels, messaging, timeline), resource requirements, risk mitigation, and success metrics with 90-day, 6-month, and 1-year milestones.

author: agentfactory
